message: feat: add OAuth2 login with GitHub provider
rationale: Adds a new authentication mechanism — clearly a feature. High risk because auth changes affect all users and involve external provider integration.

message: feat(cart): implement persistent shopping cart with Redis
rationale: Introduces a new capability (persistent cart) using Redis. Medium risk — new infrastructure dependency but contained to the cart domain.

message: fix: resolve null pointer in UserService.getById()
rationale: Fixes a null pointer exception — unambiguous bugfix. Medium risk because it touches production service logic that handles user retrieval.

message: fix(payments): prevent double charge on retry after network timeout
rationale: Fixes a race condition causing duplicate payment charges. High risk because payment processing directly affects money and involves distributed system concerns.

message: refactor: extract validation logic into dedicated Validator class
rationale: Pure structural reorganization without behavior change. Low risk because validation logic is moved not modified, and tests should catch regressions.

message: refactor(db): replace raw SQL queries with repository pattern
rationale: Architectural refactor applying repository pattern across the data layer. Medium risk because touching many files increases chance of missed edge cases even without logic changes.

message: test: add unit tests for OrderCalculator edge cases
rationale: Adds test coverage with no production code changes. Low risk — test-only commit cannot break production behavior.

message: test: add integration tests for checkout flow with Stripe mock
rationale: Integration test suite addition with mock dependencies. Low risk — adds test infrastructure only.

message: docs: add API reference for the /orders endpoint
rationale: Documentation-only change. Low risk because it cannot affect runtime behavior.

message: docs: update README with Docker setup and environment variables
rationale: README and setup documentation update. Purely informational, no code changes.

message: chore: upgrade pytest from 7.4.0 to 8.1.0
rationale: Routine dependency version bump for the test framework. Low risk — dev dependency only, does not affect production.

message: chore: rotate expired SSL certificate for staging environment
rationale: Certificate rotation is maintenance work (chore) but carries medium risk because misconfiguration could take staging offline and affect pre-production testing.

message: perf: cache user permissions lookup with Redis TTL of 5 minutes
rationale: Caching optimization to reduce DB load on hot permission checks. Medium risk because stale cache could briefly serve outdated permissions after a role change.

message: perf(search): replace linear scan with inverted index for product search
rationale: Replaces core search algorithm entirely. High risk because the inverted index must be rebuilt, search results order may change, and the new code path is less battle-tested.

message: fix: sanitize HTML in user bio to prevent stored XSS
rationale: Fixes a stored XSS vulnerability — maps to the security category. High risk because unsanitized input was reaching the DOM and the fix must not strip legitimate content.

message: build: add Dockerfile and docker-compose for local development
rationale: Adds containerization tooling for the dev environment. Build category — affects toolchain, not application behavior. Low risk.

message: revert: undo premature feature flag removal for dark mode
rationale: Borderline case: the word 'revert' appears but there is no formal revert category in the domain — the actual change is restoring removed code paths, which maps to refactor. Low risk because it restores a previously working state.

message: feat: support bulk CSV import for product catalog
rationale: New end-to-end capability for bulk import. The test file ships with the feature. Medium risk because CSV parsing is error-prone and the new endpoint is a new attack surface.

message: refactor: split monolithic OrderService into OrderCreator and OrderFulfiller
rationale: Splits a large service class — structural refactor. Medium risk because touching core order logic across multiple files could introduce subtle behavioral regressions.

message: fix: correct off-by-one error in pagination cursor calculation
rationale: Off-by-one bug in cursor computation. Low risk because the fix is isolated to the pagination utility and the test file is included in the same commit.
